scope: codex provider auth + request build pipeline

systems.name: OpenCode Codex Identity Pipeline
systems.description: Resolver + auth threading + request-build wire-up that ensures every Responses request carries a stable per-install UUID.

containers.name: packages/opencode codex auth + resolver
containers.description: Hosts the new resolveCodexInstallationId() and the existing codex-auth bootstrap that threads installationId into credentials.

containers.name: packages/opencode-codex-provider request builder
containers.description: Existing buildResponsesApiRequest + buildClientMetadata pair; consumes installationId, writes body.client_metadata.

containers.name: Filesystem (OPENCODE_DATA_HOME)
containers.description: Stores the per-install UUID at ${OPENCODE_DATA_HOME}/codex-installation-id, mode 0644.

containers.name: OpenAI Responses API (external)
containers.description: Reads body.client_metadata.x-codex-installation-id as the per-install client identity for prefix-cache lineage and anti-abuse signals.

components.name: codex-auth bootstrap
components.description: Calls resolver once, caches UUID in process scope, sets authWithAccount.installationId.

components.name: getModel factory
components.description: Threads credentials.installationId into createCodex on every model build.

components.name: buildResponsesApiRequest
components.description: Composes request body; reads installationId from options.

components.name: buildClientMetadata
components.description: Writes client_metadata.x-codex-installation-id when installationId is truthy.

components.name: codex-installation-id file
components.description: Single UUID line, mode 0644, in OPENCODE_DATA_HOME.

components.name: Prefix-cache lineage
components.description: Backend cache routing keyed in part by client_metadata identity dimension.
